title: Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu Lyrics Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva
stanzas:
Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu (remix) Lyrics Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva
#ShankarMahadevan #Padmalatha

You..
Puratichi thalaivar
Ponmana chemmal
makkal thilagam
Doctor MGR-in
kudi irundha kovil song remix
dedicated to all Cinema fans

Aaduladan padalai kaettu
rasipathilethaan
sugam sugam sugam.
ishaa haa haa haa hoi

aasai tharum paarvaiyil
ellaam aayiram ennam
varum varum varum
ishaa ishaa ishaa ishaa hoi

aasai tharum paarvaiyil
ellaam aayiram ennam
varum varum varum

aasai tharum paarvaiyil
ellaam aayiram ennam
varum varum varum

M G rippa rippa ah
people politician
representing the city
of kind
... never forgot it
you're the people
champion
the real ..ever known

kannarugil  penmai kudiyaera
kai azhagil ilamai thadumaara
thennai ilaneeril padhamaaga
ondru naan tharavaa
idhamaaga.

senganiyil thalaivan pasi aara
thindra idam thaenin suvai oora
pangu pera varavaa
thunaiyaaga. ..

manam oonjalin meedhu
poo mazhai thoovida
uriyavan neethaane.

dance to the beat
hit the kicks down
hey shake it to the rhythm
let the pitch count
yei chocolate honey
get the speaker ..
kudiyirundha kovil.
... love

kallirukkum malare
valaindhaadu.
kalaippaara madiyil
idam podu
ullirukkum ninaivil
uravaadu
ulagaiye marandhu
vilaiyaadu....

vimmi varum azhagil
nadaipodu
vandhirukkum manadhai
edai podu
vendiyathai tharalaam
thunivaodu..

un paarvaiyile
naa oorvalam varuven
pudhumaiyai nee paadu.

Aaduladan ah..
Aaduladan  ah..
Aaduladan padalai kaettu
rasipathilethaan
sugam sugam sugam.
ishaa haa haa haa hoi

aasai tharum paarvaiyil
ellaam aayiram ennam
varum varum varum
ishaa ishaa ishaa ishaa hoi

aasai tharum paarvaiyil
ellaam aayiram ennam
varum varum varum

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the electrifying beats of Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu from the movie Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva. This remix track, composed by Amresh Ganesh, captures the vibrant energy of Tamil cinema. Dive into the rhythm and let the music elevate your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: Listen to the song and dance along (remix) Lyrics Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva #ShankarMahadevan #Padmalatha
You.. Revolutionary leader Ponmana Chemmal people's idol Doctor MGR's temple song remix dedicated to all Cinema fans
Listening to the song and enjoying it brings happiness, happiness, happiness. ishaa haa haa haa hoi
In the gaze that gives desire, countless thoughts arise, arise, arise. ishaa ishaa ishaa ishaa hoi

MGR, the people's politician representing the city of kindness... never forgotten, you're the people's champion, the real one ever known.
Near the eyes, femininity resides; in the beauty of the hands, youth hesitates. In the tender coconut water, I offer one as a gift.
In the red fruit, the leader eats to satisfy hunger; the taste of honey spreads, sharing it as a companion.
On the swing of the mind, flowers rain down; you are the one capable of it.
Dance to the beat, hit the kicks down, hey, shake it to the rhythm, let the pitch count. Chocolate honey, get the speaker... temple... love.
The flower in the stone sways; place it in the lap of art. In the inner thoughts, connect with the world and play, forgetting everything.
Walk with beauty as Vimmy comes; put your mind to it, and with determination, achieve what is needed.
In your gaze, I will parade; sing the novelty.
